brief_html: Requests the filename & time of the default icons file for the current game. This message must be sent after client authentication and before receiving SID_ENTERCHAT or Battle.net will terminate the connection.
remarks_html:
Requests the filename & time of the default icons file for the current game. This message must be sent after client authentication and before receiving SID_ENTERCHAT or Battle.net will terminate the connection.

The response to this packet is S->C SID_GETICONDATA.
